description_long: This object is a professional DJ controller, featuring a rectangular black chassis with two large jog wheels on either side, surrounded by an array of colorful, backlit buttons and rotary knobs. The central section houses multiple faders, sliders, and LED level meters, indicating its use for audio mixing and control. The surface is densely populated with tactile controls, including cue, play, and effect buttons, as well as performance pads arranged in grids. The rear panel is equipped with various input/output ports for audio connectivity, visible as metallic jacks and connectors. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on functionality and user interaction. The object is likely constructed from a combination of plastic, metal, and electronic components, designed for tabletop use in urban entertainment or event settings.
description: A professional DJ controller with dual jog wheels, colorful backlit buttons, and a central mixing section, designed for tabletop audio mixing and control.
description_view_0: Front view showing both jog wheels, central faders, and the full array of buttons and pads.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the controller and the rear panel with multiple audio ports.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the central mixing section and the symmetrical layout of controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the rear panel ports and the controller's slim profile.
attribute_control_interface: physical buttons, rotary knobs, sliders, jog wheels
